{"cards": [{"name": "Ember Raider", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Strike fast, strike twice, strike before they know you're there."", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Aggressive 2-mana creature with haste and menace. Stats are 2/1 which follows the CMC+1 guideline for commons with upside. Menace pairs well with haste for aggressive strategies, making it hard to block early attacks."}, {"name": "Worldforge Dragon", "mana_cost": "{6}{R}{R}", "cmc": 8, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample
When ~ enters, ~ deals damage equal to its power to any target.
Whenever ~ attacks, create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens that are tapped and attacking.", "flavor_text": "Where it treads, armies are born from molten stone.", "power": "7", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon with multiple abilities. ETB damage scales with power for immediate impact. Token generation on attack creates board presence and synergizes with the aggressive nature. 7/6 flying trample body is appropriately mythic at 8 mana."}, {"name": "Verdant Expedition", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path through the wilderness leads to new discoveries.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple land ramp spell at common. 2 mana for a tapped basic is the standard rate. Tests proper 'search your library' templating with the mandatory shuffle clause. Enables multicolor strategies and fixes mana."}, {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps shake the earth, its roar silences the forest.", "power": "8", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Big common creature testing the P/T ceiling. 8/6 trample for 6 mana gives 14 total stats, which is CMC+8 - high but acceptable for a keyword-only common with double colored mana requirement. Trample ensures the size matters."}, {"name": "Primal Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Whenever a creature enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
{2}{G}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a creature card with mana value 4 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability enchantment with static and activated abilities. The counter ability rewards playing creatures, while the sacrifice ability provides card advantage and board development. Mana value restriction prevents cheating expensive threats. Tests enchantment templating and activated ability costing."}]}
